backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a dairy farm management backend with access control, user profiles, customer management, delivery records, milk production/records, and cattle management including health tracking and breed/health reports.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Add Customer and Add Cattle form submission bug fixes (no-page-reload mutations with UI updates) are preserved and working after the compilation fix, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and config file's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the full shadcn/ui color token system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Query, TanStack Router with seven routes (Dashboard, Cattle, Milk, Inventory, Customers, Deliveries, Reports), and mounts the global Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Reusable cattle add/edit form with a useRef double-submission guard, supporting all cattle fields including health status with conditional sick-detail inputs and status selection.
frontend/src/components/CattleHealthChar: Recharts donut PieChart component that visualizes cattle health distribution (Healthy/Sick/Recovered) from a list of Cattle records.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Reusable customer add/edit form with a useRef double-submission guard, supporting name, address, phone, and an Active/Inactive switch matching the backend Customer type.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryQuantity: A bar chart component that displays daily delivered milk quantities (in liters) for the current month, filtering delivery records by 'delivered' status and grouping them by day.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: A dual-mode form component for adding new inventory items (with name, category, quantity, unit, and threshold fields) or updating the quantity of an existing inventory item.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell component providing a sticky header with logo, responsive desktop/mobile navigation links, a main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: A bar chart component that visualizes total milk production (in liters) for each of the last 7 days using milk records.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionTr: A line chart component that shows the 30-day milk production trend, aggregating daily totals from milk records and displaying an empty state when no data exists.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: A dialog modal that generates and previews a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for a customer, with options to open WhatsApp directly or copy the message to the clipboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: A small React hook that wraps the Clipboard API to copy text, tracking copied state and errors with an auto-reset delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state management using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including CRUD operations for user profiles, customers, cattle, milk records, and delivery records, with time utility helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines a warm earthy farm-themed CSS variable palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Defines a local TypeScript interface for an InventoryItem with fields for id, name, category, quantity, unit, and low stock threshold.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Page component for managing cattle records, displaying a stats summary and table with add/edit dialogs backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Page component for managing milk delivery customers, featuring a searchable table, add/edit dialogs, stats cards, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying summary stats (cattle, milk, deliveries, customers), recent milk records table, health/production charts, and dismissable alerts for low production or missed deliveries.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Delivery reports page that allows logging new delivery records, filtering deliveries by date or date range, viewing a delivery quantity chart, exporting to CSV, and sending WhatsApp messages to customers.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Inventory management page with local state for feed, medicine, and supplies items, supporting adding new items and updating quantities via dialogs, with low-stock alerts displayed.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Milk production page for logging daily milk yield per cattle, filtering records by date range, viewing production charts, and exporting filtered records to CSV.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Monthly reports page that aggregates delivery and milk production data for a selected month/year, showing per-customer breakdowns, delivery boy performance stats, and CSV download options.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides utility functions to export delivery records, milk production records, and customer records as downloadable CSV files with summaries appended at the bottom.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear parameters via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Formats a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for AO Farms and generates a wa.me URL with the encoded message for a given phone number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (farm, sidebar, chart, warning, success palettes), border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata including existing features, a pending fix request (AR-1) to resolve a Motoko compilation error blocking Internet Computer deployment, and a known deployment issue.
